title: Component for displaying tool call edits with diff visualization
purpose: Renders a tool call edit view that shows file path, replacement flags, line-by-line differences, and output panel.
module_context: Exports a React functional component EditView that accepts an AgentToolCallItem prop and renders structured UI elements including file path display, diff visualization, and output panel.

steps.content: Extract the input object from the tool call item and destructure file path, old string, new string, and replace all flag.
Compute the line-by-line diff between old and new strings using a memoized computation.
Render a container with file path display and replace all flag indicator if applicable.
Render the computed diff lines with appropriate styling for additions, deletions, and unchanged lines.
Render the output panel component with tool use ID, status, output, and error information.
